title: Tools Refactor — V2 Ideas
description: Deferred features from the v1 tools refactor design session (2026-05-01). These are intentionally out of scope for the initial implementation.

deferred_features.title: Tool Keybinding Injection
deferred_features.description: Allow plugins to register global keyboard shortcuts via a registerKeybinding API on ToolContext.
notes: Would require a dynamic keybinding registry (Zustand slice or Context)
Needs conflict resolution between tools and built-in shortcuts
Must handle unregistration on tool unmount
Shortcuts modal would need a dynamic 'Plugin Shortcuts' section
ToolContext is versioned (version field) to add this non-breakingly in v2
Tools can already handle internal keydown events for free — global shortcuts are the hard case

deferred_features.title: Tab Overflow + Pin/Favorites System
deferred_features.description: For > 6 tools: icons-only tabs that shrink uniformly, an overflow ⋯ button opening a popover with all tools, and a ★ pin system letting users promote up to 5 tools into the always-visible bar.
notes: V1 handles ≤ 6 tools with icon + label tabs — sufficient to start
Defer until there are actually enough real plugins to overflow
Could also explore a vertical icon sidebar (VS Code activity bar style) as an alternative

deferred_features.title: NPM Package Plugin Distribution
deferred_features.description: Plugins as publishable npm packages (overseer-plugin-*). Overseer has a config listing installed packages and resolves them from node_modules.
notes: Enables sharing and discovery via npm registry
Requires install UX, versioning, and security review
Natural v3 conversation after the ecosystem has a few tools in it
